texto: Every day in Africa a gazelle wakes up. It knows it must run faster than the fastest lion or it will be killed. Every morning a lion wakes up. It knows that it must outrun the slowest gazelle or it will starve to death. It doesn’t matter whether you are a lion or a gazelle. When the sun comes up, you better be running.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Abe Gubegna sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Every day in Africa a gazelle wakes up. It knows it must run faster than the fastest lion or it w…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, born-to-run, running, útil em momentos de bom-dia e luto.
